Should note that the minimum academic qualifications are as follows
a. 10" Std. Min 70% in Maths and Science subjects separately
b. 12” Std. Pre-Board exam 65% in Maths and Physics subjects separately.
c. Candidates should compulsorily appear in either CET/COMEDK/AIEEE/JEE/
d. Any other National Entrance Test for Professional Programs.
e. If candidate has studied other than Indian board, then they have to compulsory apply and get AIU
equivalence certificate from New Delhi. Visit www.aiu.ac.in for details
